instruction: Identify the vulnerability type using standard terminology.
input: IBM AIX 7.1, 7.2 and AIX VIOS 3.1 could allow a local user to exploit a vulnerability in the gencore user command to create arbitrary files in any directory. IBM X-Force ID: 190911.
output: The vulnerability is a Local Privilege Escalation (LPE) due to improper input validation in the 'gencore' command.
